notableEvents.label: Wild pitch run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Wild pitch by pitcher Matthew Liberatore. Brandon Lowe scores. Jared Triolo to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Fielding error by first baseman Alec Burleson on the pickoff attempt.

notableEvents.label: Bryan Reynolds GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Bryan Reynolds grounds into a double play, first baseman Alec Burleson to shortstop Thomas Saggese. Konnor Griffin out at 2nd. Bryan Reynolds out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Endy Rodríguez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Endy Rodríguez flies out sharply to center fielder Victor Scott II.

notableEvents.label: Konnor Griffin plunked
notableEvents.detail: Cardinals challenged (hit by pitch), call on the field was upheld: Konnor Griffin hit by pitch. Nick Gonzales to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Bryan Reynolds plunked
notableEvents.detail: Bryan Reynolds hit by pitch. Nick Gonzales to 3rd. Konnor Griffin to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Marcell Ozuna GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Marcell Ozuna grounds into a double play, shortstop Thomas Saggese to second baseman JJ Wetherholt to first baseman Alec Burleson. Nick Gonzales scores. Konnor Griffin to 3rd. Bryan Reynolds out at 2nd. Marcell Ozuna out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Marcell Ozuna rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Marcell Ozuna grounds into a double play, shortstop Thomas Saggese to second baseman JJ Wetherholt to first baseman Alec Burleson. Nick Gonzales scores. Konnor Griffin to 3rd. Bryan Reynolds out at 2nd. Marcell Ozuna out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Spencer Horwitz pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Spencer Horwitz singles on a sharp line drive to left fielder Nathan Church. Konnor Griffin scores. Oneil Cruz to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Endy Rodríguez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Endy Rodríguez flies out to right fielder Jordan Walker.

notableEvents.label: Walk-off loss
notableEvents.detail: Iván Herrera homers (5) on a fly ball to left center field. Victor Scott II scores. JJ Wetherholt scores.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Oneil Cruz singles on a ground ball to right fielder Jordan Walker. Oneil Cruz to 2nd. Oneil Cruz advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by right fielder Jordan Walker.
